msgs: Do you know what day it is today?

rejectHitTexts: Here is a hint: it is a day made for love.
Still guessing? I will help you out.
It is our little celebration day.

msgs: Do you know what I am thinking about right now?

rejectHitTexts: Not quite. Hint: it is a person.
You are definitely pretending not to know.

msgs: I was thinking about playing games
I was thinking about you, of course.
Wait, you do not believe me?
And you have not received any gift yet?
Do not worry. I prepared something.
The gift is on the way, and so am I.
I also wrote you a letter.
What do you think? Sweet enough?
